data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Adobe's platform utilizes a microservices architecture to enable scalability and flexibility.
data.technical_spec: Decomposed services, each independently deployable and scalable.

data.title: RESTful APIs
data.description: Use of RESTful APIs to facilitate communication between services and client applications.
data.technical_spec: HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) with JSON payloads.

data.title: Cloud-Native Infrastructure
data.description: Adobe leverages cloud-native technologies for infrastructure and platform agility.
data.technical_spec: Kubernetes clusters, containerized applications, auto-scaling environments.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Globally distributed CDN for fast content delivery and improved user experience.
data.technical_spec: Edge caching, optimized content routing, and tier-one network partners.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Use of distributed and scalable databases to manage large volumes of data efficiently.
data.technical_spec: NoSQL databases, relational databases, distributed data models.
